diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@
         

     def forward(self, x, mask):

         attn_weights = self.attention(x).squeeze(-1)

-        attn_weights = attn_weights.masked_fill(mask == 0, -1e9)

+        attn_weights = attn_weights.masked_fill(mask == 0, -1e4)

         attn_weights = torch.softmax(attn_weights, dim=-1)

         weighted_x = torch.sum(x * attn_weights.unsqueeze(-1), dim=1)

         return weighted_x

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -42,7 +42,7 @@
     

     loader = DataLoader(

         dataset, 

-        batch_size=32, 

+        batch_size=16, 

         shuffle=False, 

         collate_fn=lambda b: collate_fn(b, batch_converter),

         num_workers=4,

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -43,7 +43,7 @@
     train_dataset = AAVDataset(train_csv, model.alphabet)

     val_dataset = AAVDataset(val_csv, model.alphabet)

     

-    batch_size = 32

+    batch_size = 16

     train_loader = DataLoader(

         train_dataset, 

         batch_size=batch_size,
